jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDFC First Bank Consulting Pvt Ltd!
